name: Rohkostsalat (Cabbage Fruit Salad with Sour-Cream Dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cabbage and apple by washing and shredding the cabbage and dicing the apple without peeling.
2. Use 1 tablespoon of lemon juice to lightly coat the diced apple to prevent darkening.
3. Toss together the shredded cabbage, raisins, and coated diced apple.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the fruit juices (pineapple juice), salt, and sugar until well combined.
5. Add the sour cream to the mixture and stir until smooth.
6. Pour the sour cream dressing over the salad and gently toss to combine.
7. Chill the salad before serving.
